title: Level 510.5
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 510.5: "Gray Winters"}}{{CSS|content=/* Page */ .page { font-family:Comfortaa; padding: 25px; text-shadow: 3px 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); }}}
__NOTOC__ {{Background|file=Whitebackground.png}} {{CSS|User:AbhishekTheSorcerer/ahref.css}}
{{Blurbackground|file=510-5-1.png}} {{CSS|User:AbhishekTheSorcerer/ahrefwhite.css}}
{{CSS|User:AbhishekTheSorcerer/TotalVoided.css}} {{CSS|content= .page { -font-family: arial } .gray { -webkit-filter: grayscale(100%); filter: grayscale(100%); } html { -webkit-filter: grayscale(100%); filter: grayscale(100%); } }} {{Class 1|safety=Safe Safe?|security=Stable Unstable|class=1}}{{Blurimage|file=510-5-1.png|caption=Pine trees covered in snow}} ==Description== The sub-layer Level 510.5 exists beneath [[Level 510]] and discloses itself through undocumented noclip events combined with sudden occurrences of disorientation when investigating abandoned buildings in the grayscale city. The complete monochrome design of the level displays a static arrangement of deserted locations that blend aspects of woodland area with ritualistic ground and deteriorating historical remains. All objects have no color which results in their complete removal of every hue. The area remains unchanged since both the instant of loss and the instant of recollection forever took place. {{Blurimage|file=510-5-5.png|caption=Photograph taken by a wanderer woken up from sleep in the level}}The initial phase of the level begins under pine trees whose branches are covered by snow. A path emerges from beneath the shadow of tall trees that have encircled it while their branches remain motionless in the tundra climate. The forest is deathly quiet. One cannot detect any wind moving the tree needles while all sounds including footsteps and breath and even heartbeats dissolve into the temporary silence of the snow-covered surroundings. This area induces a profound quietude, not just around, but within the mind. The unsettling feelings in the head push down on the mind of people who delay their departure like a noise-free force that acts like self-censorship. {{Blurimage|file=510-5-3.png|caption=A structure in the level...}}The clearing contains a free-standing battered wooden door which faces the void surrounding it. The door exists without any external support or hangars or attachments to external walls yet its doors swing open. The glass window of the door presents different images to each person who checks it. The doorway presents itself as either a hallway to some or a missing home to many others but becomes only darkness to a few vision. Entering the door does not necessitate traveling to another space although fairing through it becomes mandatory to continue deeper into the level's interior. A peculiar wooden attic follows the door which features upside-down furniture fixed to the ceiling. This unique dining arrangement shows the appearance of ancient simplicity despite its untouched state. Wandering individuals feel as if something is watching them although they spot no living thing inside the area. The upside-down dining table reveals soft sounds when people sit beneath it which include dish sounds and distant laughter followed by throat clearing noises. The dining experience runs backward from its usual form. {{Blurimage|file=510-5-6.png|caption=The Church}}Beyond the attic stand endless fields which only contain a single white church surrounded by flat grounds. The structure lacks any noticeable features that resemble a badly forgotten vision of a church building. The absence of spiritual symbols leads visitors to find only benches inside the structure which occasionally produces sounds from old wooden elements. The entry into this space causes numerous visitors to experience deep feelings of responsibility violation toward something divine. The silent whispers become audible although the room remains completely empty. Inside the chapel you can enter doors that will guide you to forbidden areas of the building. {{Blurimage|file=510-5-2.png|caption=The Door}}The door will place the wanderer in a grove where a dead tree decays above a clean and carefully prepared pillow and blanket lie beneath. Few individuals show the courage to sleep at this spot although it presents itself as a place to rest. All who enter the deep symbolic dreams experience either funeral visions or discover waterlogged rooms combined with voices which whisper to wake them from their slumber. Some never return. The ground under the grove stands out in the snowy environment because it lacks winter moisture and gives off a dry experience. A small chapel matching the size of a shoebox stands ensconced between two old tree branches in another clearing. The church shows clear signs of being hand-made and produces a faint light effect. No one has ever reached it. Climbing attempts towards the tree trigger movements in its branches which create either brief shoving motions or adjustments through length changes. People who step into this area tend to lower their voice pitch and adults claim it makes them feel childlike once again. The three elements which blend within this area are desperate memory loss combined with nostalgic emotions and the protective sensation of being safe. The distant western corner shows a brick-enclosed entrance leading toward total darkness below. The light that enters the corridor disappears as perfectly as it does inside a glass vacuum. Walking through this area results in a collection of auditory hallucinations including whispered dialogues in addition to listening to fragments of your inner thoughts. Some people claim to have heard household members and personal misgivings play in their voice during their visits to this place. Most individuals stop before the end of the hallway and none of them has provided an accurate description of the destination. A vast empty attic contains only a circular beam of light that illuminates the wall. The object exists without any visible origin or projection devices since it appears unilaterally. People react uniquely to standing in the light beam. People experience warmth and peace and occasionally feel euphoria that results in emotional crying. The circular shapes create feelings of terror within people who sense invisible entities observing them. The environment produces abnormal shadow movements that delay them seconds behind the events. == Entities == No entities have been officially confirmed in Level 510.5, though many describe the feeling of being followed. The [[silhouettes]] have been seen watching from treetops, doorways, or sitting motionless in pews. These shadows never interact and vanish when approached, but their presence is consistently reported

















Sir Bernard to his minister Rodrick about sending his son, Xavier to Level 510.5 (1745)

“Sir, you really want to let your son go there?” “I do.” “You know what that place does to men.” “I know.” “They wander for days and forget why they eat.” “He will remember.” “They lie down beside full packs and never rise again.” “He was raised to stand when others fall.” “The gray forest takes their hunger first, then their will.” “Then his will shall be the last it touches.” “You have read the journals, sir. You signed the reports.” “I signed them with a steady hand.” “And still you would send him?” “I would send no other.” “He has never walked that place.” “Nor had any brave man before the first who did.” “No one returns from it untouched.” “He does not go to return untouched.” “Not the strong. Not the faithful.” “He is both, and more than either.” “If he loses his way—” “He will make one.” “If he listens to what it shows him—” “He will listen, and not obey.” “If he leads them wrong—” “He will carry that weight himself.” “Sir…” “He is my son.” “He is my blood.” “He is my faith made flesh.” “Xavier is brave.”


















== Ingress & Egress == === Ingress === *Accessing by entering a door with frosted glass in [[Level 510]] is the only documented entrance to this sublevel. === Egress === *Noclipping in this level will take you to [[Level 510]]. This is the only documented exit. == Regress? ==
{{Collapse|initial="It watched us build our church atop its grave, and now it waits for the silence to break."|final="Obelus is back"|body=Author: [[User:AbhishekTheSorcerer|#Abhi]]
